skill_description: Whole-division starter rules for CSI Division 31 - Earthwork. Use when starting, triaging, validating, or packaging a commercial earthwork bid.
scope_rule: Base bid is limited to CSI Division 31 - Earthwork work specifically assigned to the bidder: clearing, grading, excavation, fill, compaction, dewatering, earth retention, and subgrade preparation. Site utilities, paving, concrete, landscaping, contaminated soils, rock removal, and survey must be explicitly included, excluded, or flagged before pricing.
proposal_exclusions: survey and staking by others unless listed
